testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Workflows: Page Load page loads with sidebar menu
OpenSparrow – Workflows: Page Load workflows link in sidebar is active
testcase.classname: workflows link in sidebar is active

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Workflows: Page Load grid container renders workflow list or keeps standard grid
testcase.classname: grid container renders workflow list or keeps standard grid

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Workflows: List workflow cards render if workflows are configured
testcase.classname: workflow cards render if workflows are configured

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Workflows: List each workflow card has a non-empty title
testcase.classname: each workflow card has a non-empty title

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Workflows: List each workflow card has a description paragraph
testcase.classname: each workflow card has a description paragraph

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Workflows: List grid title reflects workflow section name
testcase.classname: grid title reflects workflow section name

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Workflows: Step Wizard clicking a workflow card shows step bar
testcase.classname: clicking a workflow card shows step bar

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Workflows: Step Wizard step bar contains pill elements
OpenSparrow – Workflows: Step Wizard grid title shows step progress (Step X of Y pattern)
testcase.classname: grid title shows step progress (Step X of Y pattern)

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Workflows: Step Wizard step form renders after card click
testcase.classname: step form renders after card click

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Workflows: Step Wizard step form has submit button
OpenSparrow – Workflows: Step Wizard step form has at least one input field
testcase.classname: step form has at least one input field

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Workflows: Sidebar Navigation sidebar contains workflows link if configured
testcase.classname: sidebar contains workflows link if configured

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Workflows: Sidebar Navigation clicking sidebar workflows link shows workflow list
testcase.classname: clicking sidebar workflows link shows workflow list
